name: International Plumbing Code 2021
copyright_notice: International Plumbing Code® 2021 © 2021 International Code Council, Inc.

rules.label: Minimum Plumbing Fixtures
rules.notes_template: Verify fixture counts per IPC Table 403.1 (parallel to IBC Table 2902.1) by occupancy classification: water closets, lavatories, drinking fountains, service sinks.
rules.citation: IPC 2021 §403 / Table 403.1 – Minimum number of plumbing fixtures by occupancy classification.
rules.remediation: Build a fixture-count schedule per Table 403.1; provide drinking fountains (high+low) and service sinks per §410/§411.

rules.label: Drinking Fountains – Number & Type
rules.notes_template: Verify drinking fountains required by Table 403.1 are provided as bi-level (wheelchair + standing-height) on each floor; bottle filler may substitute per AHJ amendment.
rules.citation: IPC 2021 §410 / §410.3 – Drinking fountains shall comply with ADA §602; bi-level (hi-lo) units satisfy both wheelchair and standing-height users.
rules.remediation: Show hi-lo drinking fountains on each floor on accessible routes; verify locations against the fixture-count schedule.

rules.label: Water Heater & Service Sizing
rules.notes_template: Verify the water service is sized per §603 with minimum 3/4-in. service to dwellings; water heater set to ≤ 120°F max where serving public lavatories/showers (§607).
rules.citation: IPC 2021 §606/§607 – Water-service sizing and water-heater temperature controls.
rules.remediation: Document water-service sizing calculations and tempering valves where required.
